title: cyperus molliglumis
intro: Cyperus molliglumis, a plant species belonging to the sedge family, is commonly known as mudflat flatsedge or mudflat umbrella-sedge. Traditionally, it has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Cyperus molliglumis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its therapeutic properties, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically verified.
